title: Risk Manager (Commodity Trading)
description:
Risk Manager (Commodity Trading)

Singapore | Industry: Multi-Commodities / Global Trading

About Us

We are a leading global Agri commodity trading and processing company headquartered in Singapore, connecting producers and consumers across more than 20 countries. We trade a diverse portfolio including grains, pulses, edible oils, cotton, and food ingredients, supported by an integrated supply chain and a strong commitment to sustainability and innovation.

We are seeking an experienced Risk Manager to join our Singapore trading team and lead the risk management function for our commodity trading business. This role is ideal for a professional with deep expertise in market and credit risk who thrives in a fast-paced global trading environment.

What You’ll Be Doing

As Risk Manager, you will be responsible for overseeing market, credit, and operational risk across Agrocorp’s trading activities, ensuring robust risk controls, data integrity, and actionable insights for decision-making.

Market & Credit Risk Management

• Oversee daily P&L, mark-to-market (MTM), and exposure reporting for trading desks.

• Validate data accuracy and ensure timely escalation of breaches or anomalies.

• Monitor trading positions and exposures across physical and paper portfolios.

• Conduct Value-at-Risk (VaR), stress testing, and scenario analyses to quantify exposures.

• Set, review, and maintain trading and counterparty limits in line with risk appetite.

Risk Analytics & Systems

• Enhance reporting tools and automate processes using Excel VBA, SQL, or Python.

• Collaborate with IT and Finance to improve ETRM systems and data workflows.

• Develop dashboards and models to support risk reporting and trading insights.

Governance & Reporting

• Prepare daily and periodic risk reports for senior management and traders.

• Support credit reviews, counterparty assessments, and KYC onboarding.

• Provide clear risk commentary and recommendations for decision-making.

• Ensure compliance with internal risk frameworks and external regulatory standards.

Who We’re Looking For

• Experience: 5–12 years in risk management within a commodity trading or energy trading environment.

• Technical Skills: Strong command of P&L explain, VaR, stress testing, and exposure analysis.

• Tools: Advanced Excel (macros), proficiency in Python (required), and experience with CTRM systems.

• Knowledge: Understanding of physical and derivatives markets, and trading lifecycle.

• Mindset: Analytical, detail-oriented, and able to communicate complex ideas simply and clearly.

• Education: Degree in Finance, Economics, Engineering, or a related quantitative discipline.

Why Join Us

• Be part of a growing, global trading organization headquartered in Singapore.

• Play a key role in strengthening our global risk management framework.

• Gain exposure to diverse commodities and global trading strategies.

• Opportunity to lead risk analytics, automation, and system enhancements.

• Competitive compensation, strong team culture, and professional development opportunities.

Ready to make an impact? Apply now and be part of Agrocorp’s global growth journey. 🌾

postedCompany.description: Headquartered in Singapore, Agrocorp International is a leading integrated agricultural commodity and food solutions provider with presence in 16 countries and 25 offices. For over 30 years, Agrocorp has played a distinct role in nourishing the changing world with our agri-food supplies and solutions. To better serve our vision of nourishing a changing world, we’ve grown in size and business verticals from farm partnerships to processing plants and to retail market distribution. Our product range has widened to include a wide variety of commodities & food ingredients. In retail space, Sansar foods offers a wide range of premium pulses and HerbYvore is our plant based food range which includes non diary cheese, eggless egg, vegan ice cream etc.
postedCompany.name: AGROCORP INTERNATIONAL PTE LTD
